title: Cobblemon PC Sorter
description: A lightweight, client-side mod that helps you quickly sort and organize your Cobblemon PC boxes on client side.
body:
# Overview

A lightweight, client-side mod that helps you quickly sort and organize your Pokémon PC boxes directly from the client, without requiring any server-side installation.

![PC Layout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf015d567719d74c5f621383f9865307edcba68c.png)

(IVs and Colored Ability are from other mods)

# Key Features

- Client-side only sorting (no server modification needed)
- Fast and intuitive box reordering
Sort by IVs, Name, Dex number, Nature, Level
- Non-destructive sorting (only the box layout for the client is changed)
- Designed to be fast and responsive, even on large boxes

# Technical Notes
Works entirely on the client
Does not alter Pokémon data or their real places in the PC Box
